property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-18.0.2.1\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\Juan\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-18.0.1.1\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-18.0.2.1\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\apache-maven-3.8.6\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk1.8.0_202\bin;C:\Users\Juan\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Juan\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Juan\.dotnet\tools;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2022.2.2\bin;.
